_comment: gate-protect.py is bundled ALWAYS-ON (a PreToolUse deny on Write|Edit to the .factory/ verifier substrate) — this is the keystone enforcement, in force in every session that has the plugin enabled. Nobody legitimately writes .factory/ via the Write/Edit tool (signals, ledger, lattice, budget, sealed bars are kernel/Python-managed), so always-on denial leaves the operator's real work untouched (specs, build/, source, the bar SOURCE in spec/bars/ are all writable) while making a dispatched worker mechanically unable to forge a pass signal, rewrite the ledger to launder its autonomy tier, or edit the sealed bar it is graded against. harness-hook stays advisory (PostToolUse, never blocks).
